paragraphs.text: THE WARRIOR VICTORY PROCLAIMATION!!!

AFTER YOU HAVE DONE BOTH THE SECTIONS ON "HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS" AND "BRING FRUITS MEET FOR REPENTANCE" TO BREAK YOUR STUBBORN STRONGHOLDS AND TO SETTLE SATAN ACCUSING YOU IN THE COURT CASE IN HEAVEN, YOU NEED TO DO ANOTHER STEP.

YOU MUST ADVANCE THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN AND PUSH BACK THE KINGDOM OF DARKNESS AND BUILD A SPIRITUAL SHIELD TO PROTECT YOURSELF AND YOUR LOVED ONES, YOUR WORKPLACE, YOUR COMMUNITY BY DECLARING THE VICTORY SPIRITUAL WARRIOR PROCLAMATION OR THE MEDALLION VICTORY CHANT. THESE ARE THE WORDS OF TRUTH, WHICH ARE LIKE A TWO-EDGED SWORD THAT YOU DECLARE TO ADVANCE THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN AND PUSH BACK THE KINGDOM OF DARKNESS BY CONQUERING BACK LOST GROUNDS AND RESTORING ALL THINGS THAT HAD BEEN STOLEN AND DESTROYED BY THE DEVIL, THE ENEMY OF YOUR SOUL AND LIFE!

THE LAST DAYS OF 144,000 SPIRITUAL WARRIOR BRIDES VICTORY PROCLAMATION OR DECLARATION CALLED "THE MEDALLION CHANT". WHEN YOU DECLARE IT WITH FULL FAITH AND CONVICTION, THE ENTIRE SPIRITUAL WORLD WILL BOW DOWN TO YOU AS YOU BOW DOWN TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID WHEN YOU PROCLAIM THESE DECLARATION WORDS WITH SINCERITY, FAITH, AND CONVICTION. YOU MUST DECLARE THESE VICTORY DECLARATION, MINIMUM 15 SETS OVER 3 TIMES A DAY, JUST LIKE DANIEL IN THE BIBLE WAS TOLD TO PRAY TO US 3 TIMES A DAY. DO THIS LIKE A SOLDIER MARCHING WITH YOUR HAND RAISE UP TO YOUR SHOULDER AND YOUR THIGH LIFT UP TO 90 DEGREES AS YOU MARCH AND DECLARE THESE VICTORY DECLARATION WORDS.

THEREFORE, BY DECLARING THE VICTORY SPIRITUAL WARRIOR PROCLAMATION, OR THE MEDALLION CHANT, THE VICTORY PROCLAMATION OF THE WORDS OF TRUTH, IT IS LIKE A TWO-EDGED SWORD COMING OUT OF YOUR MOUTH TO ADVANCE AGAINST THE KINGDOM OF DARKNESS BY CONQUERING BACK LOST GROUNDS AND RESTORING ALL THINGS STOLEN, KILLED AND DESTROYED BY THE DEVIL OR ENEMY OF YOUR SOUL AND LIFE!

DO YOUR MEDALLION VICTORY PROCLAMATION /DECLARATION / CHANT BY DECLARING THE FOLLOWING WORDS OF TRUTH IN THE BIBLE AS FOLLOWS MINIMUM OF 15 SETS EACH TIME AND A MINIMUM OF 3 TIMES PER DAY! BECAUSE THE SHIELD THAT YOU BUILD WILL LAST ABOUT 3 TO 5 HOURS DEPENDING ON THE SIZE OF THE SHIELD THROUGH THE THIGH LIFT UP TO 90 DEGREES WHEN YOU MARCH; HOW THICK IS YOUR SPIRITUAL SHIELD THROUGH WHETHER YOUR HAND SWING UP TO YOUR SHOULDER LEVEL TO BUILD THE THICKNESS OF YOUR SPIRITUAL SHIELD AND WHETHER YOUR SYNCHRONIZE YOUR VOICE WITH YOUR HEART AND MIND WITH LOUDNESS AND WITH CONVICTION AND FAITH WILL ADD RESILENCE TO YOUR SPIRITUAL SHIELD THAT YOU BUILD.
HENCEFORTH,
YOUR ARM SWING UP TO YOUR SHOULDER LEVEL IS 1/3 THE POWER TO BUILD SHIELD THICKNESS:
YOUR LEG LIFT UP WITH YOUR HIGH AT 90 DEGREES TO BUILD THE SIZE OF YOUR SHIELD, 1/3

YOUR VOICE LOUDNESS SYNCRONISE WITH YOUR HEART AND MIND WITH FAITH AND WITH STRONG CONVICTION. BUILD UP THE RESILIENCE OF YOUR SPIRITUAL SHIELD IS 1/3 THAT YOU BUILD TO PROTECT YOURSELF AND ALL YOUR LOVED ONES AND ALL THOSE UNDER YOU AS WELL, BE IT YOUR STAFF, EMPLOYEES, CUSTOMERS, ALL THOSE THAT BELONG TO YOU AND UNDER YOU!
"THE MEDALLION CHANTS"
"THE SPIRITUAL WARRIOR VICTORY DECLARATION OR PROCLAIMATION OR CHANT!!!"
BELOW ARE THE WORDS TO PROCLAIM AS YOU MARCH; LIKE A SPIRITUAL SOLDIER OF THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN:

"I CHOOSE TO SUBMIT TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, WITH PEACE AND JOY, WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED, 100% YIELDEDNESS AND ALLEGIENCE, AND CHOOSE TO RESIST THE ACCUSER AND IT SHALL FLEE FROM ME! AMEN! AMEN! AMEN! HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH! (JAMES 4:7, 1 PETER 5:5-6)
Jas 4:7 Submit yourselves therefore to God. Resist the devil, and he will flee from you.

1Pe 5:5 Likewise, ye younger, submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all of you be subject one to another, and be clothed with humility: for God resisteth the proud, and giveth grace to the humble. 1Pe 5:6 Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time:
I PLEDGE TO PROTECT THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID WITH MY LIFE! AMEN! AMEN! AMEN! HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH! (MATHEW 10:28-33)

Mat 10:28 And fear not them which kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul: but rather fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in hell. Mat 10:29 Are not two sparrows sold for a farthing? and one of them shall not fall on the ground without your Father. Mat 10:30 But the very hairs of your head are all numbered. Mat 10:31 Fear ye not therefore, ye are of more value than many sparrows. Mat 10:32 Whosoever therefore shall confess me before men, him will I confess also before my Father which is in heaven. Mat 10:33 But whosoever shall deny me before men, him will I also deny before my Father which is in heaven.

I PLEDGE TO LOVE AND PROTECT THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID WITH ALL MY HEART, ALL MY SOUL, ALL MY MIGHT, AND WITH MY LIFE, AND TO LOVE THE CHILDREN OF GOD AS MYSELF. I CHOOSE TO WALK IN THE UNITY OF LOVE. (MARK 12:30-31)

Mar 12:30 And thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind, and with all thy strength: this is the first commandment. Mar 12:31 And the second is like, namely this, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself. There is none other commandment greater than these.
I WILL PRESS INTO THE KINGDOM AT ALL COSTS, INCLUDING MY LIFE AND ALL THAT I LOVE. (MATHEW 11:12)
Mat 11:12 And from the days of John the Baptist until now the kingdom of heaven suffereth violence, and the violent take it by force.
THE MEDALLION CHANT
MEDALLION CHANTS CONDENSED SUMMARY:
DO THE BELOW 15 TIMES, 3 TIMES PER DAY, WHILE YOU MARCH LIKE A SOLDIER OF THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN.

"I CHOOSE TO SUBMIT TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, WITH PEACE AND JOY, WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED, 100% YIELDEDNESS AND ALLEGIENCE, AND CHOOSE TO RESIST THE ACCUSER AND IT SHALL FLEE FROM ME! AMEN! AMEN! AMEN! HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH! (JAMES 4:7, 1 PETER 5:5-6)
I PLEDGE TO PROTECT THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID WITH MY LIFE! AMEN! AMEN! AMEN! HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH! (MATHEW 10:28-33)

I PLEDGE TO LOVE AND PROTECT THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID WITH ALL MY HEART, ALL MY SOUL, ALL MY MIGHT, AND WITH MY LIFE, AND TO LOVE THE CHILDREN OF GOD AS MYSELF. I CHOOSE TO WALK IN THE UNITY OF LOVE. (MARK 12:30-31)
I WILL PRESS INTO THE KINGDOM AT ALL COSTS, INCLUDING MY LIFE AND ALL THAT I LOVE. (MATHEW 11:12)"
WHEN YOU HAVE CONSISTENTLY DONE ALL THE FOLLOWING THAT WE HAD TAUGHT YOU BELOW DAILY :
DO "THE HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS" SECTION OF THIS BOOK TO PURIFY, HEAL AND RESTORE YOURSELF TO HEAVEN WITH THE LIVING WORDS
DO THE "BRING FRUITS MEET FOR REPENTANCE" SECTION OF THIS BOOK TO CLEAR YOUR HEAVENLY CHARGES AND TO BREAK YOUR STUBBORN STRONGHOLDS FURTHER,
DO "THE MEDALLION CHANT, THE VICTORY WARRIOR CHANT" TO BUILD A SPIRITUAL SHIELD TO PROTECT YOURSELF, YOUR FAMILY, ALL THAT IS UNDER YOU AND ALL YOUR BELONGINGS.

AND READ THIS BOOK AND ALL OUR BEHOLD MY MESSENGER FOUNDATIONAL SERIES, MEDITATE OF OUR WORDS DAY AND NIGHT AND LINK UP WITH US IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID AND SUBSCRIBED TO OUR HEAVEN BROADCAST TELEGRAM CHANNEL AND ATTEND OUR MONTHLY ZOOM MEETINGS OR WHENEVER WE CALL FOR A TEACHING AND TRAINING MEETING TAUGHT DIRECTLY BY US IN HEAVEN THROUGH OUR REPRESENTATIVE IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS THROUGH AARON K DAVID, AND ENROL TO BE TRAINED AS OUR ARCHANGELS IN HEAVEN, WHICH IS THE 144,000 VIRGIN BRIDES WITHOUT SPOT AND BLEMISHES, WHOM WE PROMISED KING DAVID IN THE BIBLE THAT HIS SEED SHALL NEVER LACK A THRONE TO RULE,

HENCEFORTH, YOU ALSO WILL BE GIVEN A SPIRITUAL THRONE, RESERVED FOR THE 144,000 VIRGIN BRIDES THAT HAD BEEN TRAINED, EQUIPPED, AND PASSED ALL OUR TESTS THROUGH OUR REPRESENTATIVES IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, PERFECTED; YOU WILL BE ENDOWED WITH GIFTINGS IMPARTED DIRECTLY BY US THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS THROUGH AARON K DAVID.

YOU WILL BE GIVEN SPIRITUAL TERRITORIES, COUNTRIES TO RULE AS ARCHANGELS, APOSTLE TO RULE AND COVER OR TO PROTECT THESE COUNTRIES ON OUR (THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID) BEHALF ONCE YOU HAVE PASSED ALL THE PRESCRIBED TESTS, FROM TESTS TO
TESTS, FROM FAITH TO FAITH, FROM GLORY TO GLORY, BY US THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS THROUGH AARON K DAVID AND WALK OUT YOUR ALLEGIANCE TOWARD US IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID!!

REMEMBER, "YOUR REPENTANCE, PURIFICATION, RESTORATION AND HEALING PRAYER" UNDER THE ENTIRE "HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS" SECTION OF THIS BOOK AND THE "BRING FRUITS MEET FOR REPENTANCE PRAYER" SECTION OF THIS BOOK COMBINED IN TOTAL IS ONLY 50%. THE OTHER 50% IS YOU MUST DO THE ABOVE MEDALLION CHANT, WHICH IS TO BUILD A SPIRITUAL SHIELD OF PROTECTION, WHICH IS EQUALLY VITAL AS WELL IN DOING SPIRITUAL WARFARE IN ADVANCING THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN AND PUSHING BACK THE KINGDOM OF DARKNESS TO PREVENT THE ENEMY FROM ATTACKING YOU AND YOUR LOVED ONES, AND EVERYTHING THAT IS UNDER YOU, IS ALSO EQUALLY IMPORTANT AS WELL!!
NEVER CEASE TO LOVE YOU ALWAYS, THE TRINITY
IN/SPOKE THROUGH
SHEKINAIH
